title: Fix mkdirSync static import and verify gates
description: Confirm mkdirSync is statically imported from "fs" at top of src/store/graph.ts, save() has no await, then run npm run build, npm test, and npm run lint to verify all gates pass. Update CLAUDE.md known-issues entry once gates are green.

plan.objective: Fix the malformed static import statement in src/store/graph.ts and verify mkdirSync usage is correct, ensuring compilation succeeds and existing tests pass.
key_changes: Fix incomplete import type statement for Graph/Node/Edge from ../types.js
Verify mkdirSync imported as named import from fs module
Run test suite to confirm 31 existing tests pass after fix
Validate TypeScript compilation succeeds without syntax errors
Ensure npm run build completes successfully

review_plan.objective: Review plan for CART-S01-T01: verify the plan's diagnosis of import issues and validate the proposed approach against the actual codebase state
key_changes: All imports in src/store/graph.ts are already syntactically correct — no malformed or incomplete imports exist
mkdirSync is already a named import alongside readFileSync/writeFileSync/existsSync — no fix needed
save() is synchronous with no await — CART-B01 regression already mitigated
TypeScript compilation (tsc) passes with zero errors; all 31 tests pass
Plan overstates the bug as 'malformed/incomplete' imports — should frame as verification work
Plan omits AC5 (lint gate) and AC6 (CLAUDE.md cleanup) from acceptance criteria
Plan does not document the export { load, save } change — only actual code delta
